name: @ondewo/ondewo-t2s-client-js
description: ONDEWO Text to Speech (T2S) Client library for Js
author: ONDEWO GmbH <office@ondewo.com>

scripts.test: c8 --check-coverage --lines 100 --branches 100 --functions 100 --include auth/offlineTokenProvider.js --exclude '**/*.spec.js' --reporter text -- node --test auth/offlineTokenProvider.spec.js examples/client.spec.js
